criteria_verification.notes: tests/bdd/test_memory_mcp_server.py created and listed in files_created. Player describes scenarios() binding to memory-mcp-server.feature with all 31 scenarios. Honesty verification passed.
Player reports 29 scenarios pass with mock_store, mock_writer, mock_settings fixtures. Authoritative test signal tests_passed=true. Honesty verification shows zero discrepancies.

Player describes unreachable_store_context fixture with dual verification: (1) structured error messages returned (2) server remains running (context['mcp_server'] is not None). Covers all three degradation scenarios.
Player describes pytest.importorskip('fleet_memory.retrieval') gating for all search scenarios, enabling forward compatibility with FEAT-MEM-05. Proper skip message provided.

tests/integration/test_mcp_stdio_e2e.py created with @pytest.mark.integration. Player describes four test scenarios including headline write-then-find with ephemeral_pg fixture and tools_advertised_over_stdio verification.
Player reports 515 passed, 2 skipped, 65 deselected with integration tests properly excluded by pyproject.toml addopts. Authoritative test signal confirms tests_passed=true with zero failures.

Player describes register_all in server.py registering four items: register_projects_resource, search.register, supersede.register, write.register. Integration test test_register_all_advertises_four_items provides verification.

rationale: All seven acceptance criteria verified. Authoritative test signal (evidence_bundle.tests.tests_passed=true, tests_failed=0) combined with zero honesty discrepancies (score 1.0) and all quality gates passed provides strong confidence. The BDD oracle runner error is a known configuration issue (attempting to execute feature file directly rather than the pytest test file that binds to it) and does not override the authoritative test verification. Player delivered comprehensive test coverage: 31 BDD scenarios bound, mocked fixtures for in-process testing, degradation scenarios with dual verification, retrieval gating for forward compatibility, and integration tests properly marked and excluded from default runs. The stdio subprocess tests provide end-to-end verification of the MCP server's advertised tools and headline write-then-find scenario.
